theoremName: Weyl symbol coordinate-kernel transport consequence theorem

weylSymbolKernelTransportConsequenceStat.label: Weyl symbol to coordinate-kernel transport consequence
weylSymbolKernelTransportConsequenceStat.reason: In the fixed Weyl convention, the coordinate kernel quadratic form is exactly the Weyl operator quadratic form <Op^W(sigma_omega)f,f> on the test domain.

proof: Import the full Weyl symbol coordinate-kernel transport theorem.
